_source: https://journalranking.org/ — Chartered ABS Academic Journal Guide (AJG) rankings
_note: Local mirror of the journalranking.org AJG grade table. Vendored because journalranking.org is Cloudflare-blocked for cloud IPs (like the PNAS/INFORMS-editors local scrapers), so this file is the offline reference for auditing the ABS grades used by /lit/ and its satellite data shards (lit-data-abs4, lit-data-abs3-omecon, lit-data-abs3-rest). Columns mirror the site's table: one ISSN per row (as journalranking.org lists it), FIELD, TITLE, PUBLISHER, and the AJG 2024/2021/2018 grades.
